share.share_text:
So 2016 was quite an incredibly year for me! It wouldn't have been possible if it wasn't for any of you guys liking and sharing my stuff, and it's changed my life, so in return I want to do something to "give back" and host a little giveaway thing, basically whoever -likes this picture -follows my Instagram (@mrciantwomey)
-tags 4 of their friends
will be having me ringing you and you will allow me to buy you whatever the fuck you want online, kind of like a little shopping spree thing.
So yeah, best of luck! I'll be DM'ing the winner and I'll publicly announce it in 7 days! 
Thank you all so much again for everything, you're the best! X

title: Ainslee Violette, Lee Keira, Jamesey Brandt and Instagram user
